{{Infobox concept
| name = Alin's eyes
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin's eyes]] have pure white whites and shifting rainbow-colored irises.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin's eyes]] shine with the rainbow of colors from [[Elysia]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]]'s rainbow eyes had orange prominent slices.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
